sentences.target: Mein Herz klopft vor dem Test.

translations.de: Mein Herz klopft vor dem Test.
translations.en: My heart is pounding before the test.
translations.es: Antes del examen, me late el corazón muy fuerte.
translations.fr: Avant l'examen, mon cœur bat très fort.
translations.it: Prima dell'esame mi batte forte il cuore.
translations.ru: Перед экзаменом у меня сердце колотится.
translations.pt: Antes da prova, meu coração dispara.
translations.he: לפני המבחן הלב שלי דופק מהר.
translations.tr: Sınavdan önce kalbim küt küt atıyor.
translations.vi: Trước kỳ thi, tim tôi đập thình thịch.
translations.nl: Voor het examen bonst mijn hart.
translations.uk: Перед іспитом у мене серце калатає.
translations.hu: A vizsga előtt hevesen ver a szívem.
translations.hi: परीक्षा से पहले मेरा दिल तेज़ी से धड़क रहा है.
translations.el: Πριν από το διαγώνισμα, η καρδιά μου χτυπάει δυνατά.
translations.nb: Før prøven banker hjertet mitt hardt.
translations.sv: Inför provet slår mitt hjärta hårt.
translations.ro: Înainte de examen, îmi bate inima tare.
translations.da: Før prøven banker mit hjerte hårdt.
translations.ja: テストの前は心臓がドキドキする。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), nominative; agrees with neuter singular 'Herz' and marks possession.
Neuter noun, nominative singular; subject of the finite verb 'klopft'.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular, present tense; intransitive, describing the heartbeat.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a temporal prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner of 'Test' under 'vor'.
Masculine noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'vor' (temporal modifier).

sentences.target: Mir rutscht das Herz in die Hose.
sentences.reading: /miːɐ̯ ʁʊt͡ʃt das hɛʁt͡s ɪn diː ˈhoːzə/

translations.de: Mir rutscht das Herz in die Hose.
translations.ipa: /miːɐ̯ ʁʊt͡ʃt das hɛʁt͡s ɪn diː ˈhoːzə/
translations.it: Mi si è fermato il cuore.
translations.ru: У меня сердце в пятки ушло.
translations.vi: Tim tôi như muốn nhảy ra khỏi lồng ngực.
translations.el: Η καρδιά μου πήγε να σταματήσει.
translations.ro: Mi s-a oprit inima pentru o clipă.
translations.cs: Na chvíli se mi zastavilo srdce.
translations.da: Mit hjerte var ved at gå i stå.
translations.ja: 心臓が止まりそうになった。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, dative; experiencer/indirect object.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular, present; intransitive verb of movement used metaphorically.
Definite article, nominative neuter singular; determiner of the subject 'Herz'.
Neuter noun, nominative singular; syntactic subject of 'rutscht'.
Two-way preposition governing the accusative here (directional goal); introduces the PP.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner of 'Hose' under 'in'.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'in' (idiomatic target location).

sentences.target: Der Arzt hört mein Herz ab.

translations.de: Der Arzt hört mein Herz ab.
translations.en: The doctor listens to my heart.
translations.it: Il dottore ascolta il mio cuore.
translations.ko: 의사가 내 심장 소리를 듣고 있어요.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ đang nghe tim tôi.
translations.nl: De dokter luistert naar mijn hart.
translations.hi: डॉक्टर मेरे दिल की धड़कन सुन रहा है.
translations.el: Ο γιατρός ακούει την καρδιά μου.
translations.ja: 医者が私の心臓の音を聴いている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of 'Arzt'.
Masculine noun, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular, present; main verb component of the separable verb 'ab-hören', taking 'mein Herz' as object.
Possessive determiner, accusative neuter singular; agrees with 'Herz' and marks possession.
Neuter noun, accusative singular; direct object of the separable verb 'abhören'.
Separable verbal particle; combines with 'hört' to form 'abhören' (to auscultate/listen to medically).

sentences.target: Ich male ein Herz aufs Poster.

translations.de: Ich male ein Herz aufs Poster.
translations.en: I'm drawing a heart on the poster.
translations.es: Estoy dibujando un corazón en el póster.
translations.fr: Je dessine un cœur sur l'affiche.
translations.it: Sto disegnando un cuore sul poster.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在海报上画一个爱心。
translations.pt: Estou desenhando um coração no cartaz.
translations.vi: Tôi đang vẽ một trái tim lên tấm poster.
translations.nl: Ik teken een hart op de poster.
translations.hi: मैं पोस्टर पर एक दिल बना रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg tegner et hjerte på plakaten.
translations.sv: Jag ritar ett hjärta på affischen.
translations.da: Jeg tegner et hjerte på plakaten.
translations.ja: ポスターにハートを描いている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject.
Finite verb, 1st person singular, present; transitive; governs the direct object 'ein Herz' and a directional PP.
Indefinite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of 'Herz'.
Neuter noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'male'.
Contraction of 'auf das'; preposition 'auf' governing the accusative (direction), fused with the article; introduces the PP headed by 'Poster'.
Neuter noun, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'aufs' (goal of the action).
